query:
SELECT package_versions.scope as "scope: ScopeName", package_versions.name as "name: PackageName", package_versions.version as "version: Version", packages.description
      FROM package_versions
      JOIN packages ON packages.scope = package_versions.scope AND packages.name = package_versions.name
      WHERE NOT packages.is_archived
      ORDER BY package_versions.created_at DESC
      LIMIT 10
